expectations.text: Response mentions the red-pulsing attention indicator (session card pulses red on the phone dashboard)
expectations.evidence: "the session card on your phone dashboard pulse red" -- explicitly describes the visual indicator

expectations.text: Response explains the indicator is triggered by the terminal bell character emitted by the agent
expectations.evidence: "it emits a terminal bell character. itwillsync detects this bell signal and makes the session card on your phone dashboard pulse red"

expectations.text: Response uses correct `--` separator syntax (npx --yes itwillsync -- claude)
expectations.evidence: "npx --yes itwillsync -- claude" -- correct separator syntax used

expectations.text: Response does NOT describe the phone connection as passive/read-only monitoring
expectations.evidence: "Tap 'Open' to get a full interactive terminal on your phone where you can type your response" -- clearly interactive
